hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Session done. If .kt files changed, run: ./gradlew :app:compileLiteDebugKotlin"}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '^/home/khapv/\.claude/(CLAUDE\.md|skills/|settings\.json|agents/)' | while read -r f; do
  if [[ "$f" == *CLAUDE.md ]]; then
    cp "$f" /home/khapv/Claude_Usage/my_claude_skills/CLAUDE.md
  elif [[ "$f" == *settings.json ]]; then
    cp "$f" /home/khapv/Claude_Usage/my_claude_skills/settings.json
  elif [[ "$f" == *skills/* ]]; then
    rsync -a /home/khapv/.claude/skills/ /home/khapv/Claude_Usage/my_claude_skills/skills/
  elif [[ "$f" == *agents/* ]]; then
    rsync -a /home/khapv/.claude/agents/ /home/khapv/Claude_Usage/my_claude_skills/agents/
  fi
done 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty')
if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.kt$'; then
  DIR=$(dirname "$FILE")
  while [[ "$DIR" != "/" ]]; do
    if [[ -f "$DIR/gradlew" ]]; then
      OUTPUT=$(cd "$DIR" && ./gradlew :app:compileLiteDebugKotlin --quiet 2>&1)
      EXIT=$?
      if [[ $EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then
        echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Compile FAILED - fix before continuing:\\n$(echo "$OUTPUT" | tail -30 | sed 's/"/\\"/g')\"}"
        exit 2
      fi
      break
    fi
    DIR=$(dirname "$DIR")
  done
fi

if git -C "$PWD" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree &>/dev/null; then
  BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
  LOG=$(git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null)
  STATUS=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null)
  MSG="Git context:\nBranch: $BRANCH"
  [[ -n "$LOG" ]] && MSG="$MSG\n\nRecent commits:\n$LOG"
  [[ -n "$STATUS" ]] && MSG="$MSG\n\nChanged files:\n$STATUS"
  echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"$(echo "$MSG" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')\"}"
fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty')
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|push|reset\s+--hard|checkout\s+\.|restore\s+\.|clean\s+-f|branch\s+-[Dd])'; then
  echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Git commit/push/destructive operations are managed by the user. Do not run: $CMD\"}"
  exit 2
fi
